items.summary: Update the Dashboard calculation for the card "Dus (RDV Faits ; Mois Courant)" so it uses the exact same logic as the "Listing Mensuel" table total for "Crédit Négatif" (i.e., the monthlyListing.ts Excel-formula calculation), instead of reading backend field totalSoldeRestantNegatif.

Ensure the Dashboard has access to the required inputs for the shared negative-credit calculation (current month listings, previous month listings for credit carry-over, and all appointments), and use them consistently for the "Dus" card computation.
